query:
SELECT id, startedAt, executionType, status, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, NOW()) as minutesElapsed
FROM scrapingLogs 
WHERE status = 'running' 
ORDER BY startedAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uDLYjDbp6rUVuo.05399e1d7c2a --database NY6jPB2PH8byUzFWqjpfhf --execute SELECT id, startedAt, executionType, status, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, startedAt, NOW()) as minutesElapsed
FROM scrapingLogs 
WHERE status = 'running' 
ORDER BY startedAt DESC;
